sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108189" key="u(poglau/kwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογλαύκ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slight cataract,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.115</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
